title: AI video conferencing tool review: Zoom vs Microsoft Teams vs Google Meet remote communication comparison - 2026 Review
description: Evaluate the intelligent functions and collaboration experience of AI video conferencing tools such as Zoom, Microsoft Teams, and Google Meet to help you find the most suitable communication solution for remote teams.
content: \u003ch2\u003eVideo conferencing needs of remote teams\u003c/h2\u003e\u003cp\u003eRemote teams rely on video conferencing: team communication, customer meetings, training presentations. AI video conferencing tools can intelligently record, automatic subtitles, and meeting summaries.\u003c/p\u003e\u003ch2\u003eComparison of Core Features\u003c/h2\u003e\u003ctable\u003e\u003ctr\u003e\u003cth\u003efunction\u003c/th\u003e\u003cth\u003eZoom\u003c/th\u003e\u003cth\u003eMicrosoft Teams\u003c/th\u003e\u003cth\u003eGoogle
author: Video Conferencing Analyst
